positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric wreath composed of interlocking celestial flora and abstract botanical motifs. The design features bold linework, interlocking mandalas, and elements representing stylized ferns and crescent moons. Colors should utilize a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, muted gold, and crisp off-white. The composition is designed as a clean, circular silhouette suitable for central chest placement on apparel. Minimalist, highly detailed, symmetry, art deco influence, vector illustration style, clean linework, flat graphic design, elegant.
